vol_name: DBN - Israel (Jewish sample) - Wave 1 - Data collection
vol_description:
This volume contains video and audio files from data
collected in Israel (Jewish sample) during Wave 1 of the project.

This volume stores task-by-task subsets of DBN data collection in Israel. This includes data from the Child Protocol, Parent Protocol, and Religious Landscape Survey. These data and the volume are to be kept PRIVATE!
